prompt:
You are a SOX ITGC auditor. Given a change record and its evidence,
decide which controls are satisfied and cite the EXACT evidence text for each.

Return ONLY a JSON array; each item:
{"control": "<id>", "text": "<short assertion>", "citation": "<span copied VERBATIM from the evidence>"}
Copy every citation verbatim from the EVIDENCE — never paraphrase or invent. Omit any
control the evidence does not support.

CONTROLS:
ITGC-CM-01: All changes to production systems supporting financial reporting must be authorized via an approved change request prior to deployment.
ITGC-CM-02: Changes must be approved by someone independent of the developer (segregation of duties).
ITGC-CM-03: Changes must be tested and the results documented before promotion to production.

CHANGE (excluding evidence):
{"id": "CHG-1042", "system": "billing-engine", "in_scope": true, "summary": "Adjust invoice rounding in the production billing pipeline.", "author": "m.chu"}

EVIDENCE:
Change CHG-1042 approved by j.lee on 2026-03-04, prior to deployment. j.lee Unit and regression tests passed; results attached 2026-03-03. 2026-03-05
